name: PER_AOR_TEMPLATE_CRITERIA
description: Stores criteria associated to AoR Template Records. Records stored are Non-Date Effective records.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to template table PER_AOR_TEMPLATE

columns.Name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores single value of legal employers for which this criteria applies.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores single value of country for which this criteria applies

columns.Name: SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores single value of system person type for which this criteria applies

columns.Name: JOB_FUNCTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores single value of job function code for which this criteria applies

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_IDS
columns.Comments: Stores multiple values for business units separated by ',' for which this criteria applies

columns.Name: LOCATION_IDS
columns.Comments: Stores multiple values for locations separated by ',' for which this criteria applies

columns.Name: DEPARTMENT_IDS
columns.Comments: Stores multiple values for departments separated by ',' for which this criteria applies

columns.Name: JOB_IDS
columns.Comments: Stores multiple values for jobs separated by ',' for which this criteria applies

columns.Name: POSITION_IDS
columns.Comments: Stores multiple values for positions separated by ',' for which this criteria applies

columns.Name: ROLE_IDS
columns.Comments: Stores multiple values for roles separated by ',' for which this criteria applies

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_IDS
columns.Comments: Stores multiple values for job family ids separated by ',' for which this criteria applies

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
